# Neelanjana Basu

> Ex-Amazon senior product manager, now building award-winning AI products end to end.

Portfolio site of Neelanjana Basu — 10 years as an Amazon PM shipping $2B+ in impact, now shipping AI products in public hackathons and challenges.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, AI products built, Amazon experience, skills, and contact.

## Optional

- [Build logs on Substack](https://neelanjana.substack.com/): Long-form writeups of each AI product build.
